description_long: This is a low-top athletic sneaker featuring a combination of dark olive green and yellow accents. The upper is constructed from a mix of suede and mesh materials, providing both durability and breathability. The shoe has a white midsole with a yellow stripe running along the heel, and a textured rubber outsole for traction. The heel counter is reinforced and highlighted with a yellow overlay, while the collar is padded for comfort. The lacing system uses standard eyelets and flat laces, and the interior is lined with a light gray fabric. The overall design is sporty and casual, suitable for urban environments.
description: A dark olive green and yellow low-top sneaker with suede and mesh upper, white midsole, and textured rubber outsole. Features include a padded collar, reinforced heel, and standard lacing.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, yellow heel accent, and white midsole.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the yellow heel overlay and padded collar.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the lacing system, toe box texture, and interior lining.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the toe area, laces, and the curvature of the sole.
